title: helianthus vicetinus
intro: Helianthus vicetinus, also known as the lesser sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and inflammation. The plant contains flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Helianthus vicetinus is often prepared as a tea or infuse, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
